mapper.select: select u.id, u.registerDate, u.password from users_chatroom uc join users u on uc.uid = u.id where uid=#{uid} and rid=#{rid}
mapper.insert: insert into users(id, password, isOnline) values(#{id}, #{password}, #{isOnline})
mapper.select: select r.id, r.createdTime from chatroom r join users_chatroom uc on uc.rid = r.id where uc.uid = #{uid};
mapper.update: update users set isOnline=#{isOnline} where id=#{uid}
